name: Team RWBY // Judgement Day
description:
Your Salem's heir and overthrew her. With you now in power, team RWBY is sent to assassinate you, but fail rather quickly. Are you going to forgive them?

As of now, there is still no final candidate for the last bot request. Make it count.

Artist~
